calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-13-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha. CSR: CSR: B. Fields, #7235

Dana Andreoli, Esq. present for plaintiff W.W. Wharf GL, Inc. a Delaware Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sharon Gurewitz, was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default has been entered against the Defendant.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Sandalwood, Inc. and Dan Yam for Judgment as follows:

Damages - $314,607.86
Prejudgment Interest - $47,665.18
Costs - $2,099.50
Attorney Fees - $11,800.94
Total judgment in the amount of $376,176.48

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2011 Continued To Sep-26-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $350.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/26/2011 at 1:30 PM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)
